codeReview.summary: Pass. The feature implementation matches the requested Claude-only source-tab behavior without broadening platform scope. In `src/pages/PlatformView.tsx:51-52`, `:124-141`, and `:218-271`, the page keeps a Claude-only `sourceFilter` state, computes `sourceFilteredSkills` before the existing search filter, renders exactly the three requested tabs only when `agent.id === "claude-code"`, and preserves the existing row objects so duplicate marketplace rows, source badges, and read-only treatment remain intact inside the selected slice. The updated regressions in `src/test/PlatformView.test.tsx:585-720` explicitly cover the default `全部` view, user-only and marketplace-only filtering, tab-scoped search behavior, duplicate-row preservation within a selected source slice, and the non-Claude regression guard.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission shared state still lacks an approved worker commit workflow for dirty shared trees. Mission guidance forbids cleaning or stashing unrelated work, but the worker still had to improvise a temporary-index commit flow to produce a feature commit.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/Users/happypeet/.factory/missions/a998172c-79b0-469d-a170-fcefe54fb0eb/AGENTS.md:67` says workers must avoid cleaning/stashing unrelated dirty files, while `/Users/happypeet/.factory/missions/a998172c-79b0-469d-a170-fcefe54fb0eb/handoffs/2026-04-23T00-59-47-834Z__claude-source-tab-filter-followup__ec739882-1845-472b-b682-e51d7fc94804.json:75-85` records `followedProcedure: false` because the worker created commit `073fedc6a19e8c099a803e86357e5d8ad17f724e` via a temporary git index instead of the normal clean-tree flow.

summary: Pass: the Claude Code page now exposes the requested three source tabs, filters rows by source before search, keeps duplicate/read-only marketplace rows intact within the active slice, and does not affect other platforms.
